title: Mr. S / The Smuggling Web
bodyText:
The S-crest bag; the S-marked corpses; **the mark was a tracker** (Spells removed it, S18); [[pc-trunks|Trunks]]' vials (Spells co-created); the smuggling ring; the F & B chairmanship; the secret weapon + open **wish** to [[pc-felson|Felson]]; and the kill shot: **"Our business is over"** — Spells canceling [[root-darkpass|Root]]'s Misty Step (S20).

# The open questions
What was the Root business? What does Spells actually move through the smuggling ring — and did the dig serve it? What does he want with Felson? Why is a 2,000-year-old reformed dhampir collecting board seats?

> [!dm] **Triage (grill 2026-07-09): background character, NOT story-essential.** Improvise him at the table for now; no need to lock a grand want. The open questions above are optional flavor, not homework. Promote him later only if a session pulls him back to center.
